label: Product
description: Stores Meridian Leasing Company's product offerings and SKUs. Configuration includes product setup in the target org, recreation of current product fields, creation of a custom Product_Type__c field to reinforce bundle logic, and configuration of product bundle relationships. Active and inactive product records are reviewed for migration.
migrationNotes: Product records related to MLC Assets migrated. Review active and inactive product records for inclusion. Product bundle relationships must be preserved.

relationships.description: Product has PricebookEntry records linking it to Pricebooks
Product looked up from MLC Asset records via Product__c field
Product participates in Product Bundle structures as parent or child bundle component

fields.label: Product Type
fields.notes: Custom field added to reinforce bundle logic. Distinguishes bundle parent products from component child products.

pageLayout.notes: Recreate current page layout. Confirm Product_Type__c is visible and accessible.

fieldLevelSecurity.notes: Align FLS to the one standardized profile. Product_Type__c must be accessible to the profile.

source: Meridian Leasing - Salesforce Sales Cloud Migration Design Document (Magna Technology Group, May 2026)
